intro:
Run your medieval shop: strike deals, trade rare and magical goods, and manage your business like a true master.
Turn it into the richest store, known across the entire kingdom.
description: Take control of your own shop in the heart of a medieval world and turn it into a true legend. Sign profitable contracts with top suppliers, unlock licenses for rare and magical items, manage your inventory, and hire reliable workers. Expand your business, attract more customers, and never let anyone leave empty-handed. Build the richest and most renowned shop in the entire kingdom.
